title: Vacancy for Teacher at Manipal University

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Manipal University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Manipal University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About Manipal University:
Manipal University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal University!
